english_text:
Elite (روح) — Selfless Love → Allah
Moderator (العقل) — Informed Love ↔ Allah
Tyrant (نفس) — Selfish Love → Allah
alt_text: Triangular diagram with Allah's calligraphic name at top vertex. Three figures at the base: a dove with olive branch labelled 'Elite / روح', a judge labelled 'Moderator / العقل', a crowned king labelled 'Tyrant / نفس'. Arrows show Selfless Love, Informed Love, and Selfish Love directed at Allah.
notes: Pedagogical typology of three souls (roh, 'aql, nafs) and the corresponding modes of love directed at God.
